title: agrostis pulchella
intro: Agrostis pulchella, also known as Red Top or Red Millet, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, Agrostis pulchella has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Agrostis pulchella can be made into a tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
